title: Pinterest Q1 2021 Earnings: Surprising Guidance, More Surprising Reaction
text: Pinterest delivered Q1 2021 results that beat analyst expectations. Revenue was $474 million, beating analyst estimates, with monthly active users reaching 480.5 million. The company provided forward guidance expecting revenue to grow in the low 70% range year over year for the coming quarter. The number of Pinners engaging with shopping surfaces had grown over 200% in the last year, and revenue from retailers with sales objectives represented 20% of total revenue at the end of Q1. Additionally, Pinterest launched advertising in Brazil that quarter, an important milestone in growing its global ads business. The strong results and forward guidance highlighted the company's momentum in monetization and global expansion.
